from notebookutils import mssparkutils
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

workspace = mssparkutils.env.getWorkspaceName()

if workspace == "pins-synw-odw-prod-uks":
    storage_account_name = "pinsstmpescproduksqz8bvk"
elif workspace == "pins-synw-odw-dev-uks":
    storage_account_name = "pinsstmpescdevuksw49hqz"
else:
    raise ValueError(f"Unknown workspace '{workspace}'")


mpesc_base_path = f"abfss://mpesc@{storage_account_name}.dfs.core.windows.net"

print("Using:", mpesc_base_path)

# INPUT: LLAttrData (EAV) CSV
llattrdata_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/LLAttrData.csv"

# OUTPUT BASE folder
output_base = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/LLAttr"

print("Input :", llattrdata_path)
print("Output:", output_base)

df = (
    spark.read
         .option("header", True)
         .option("sep", "|")
         .option("quote", "\"")
         .option("escape", "\"")
         .option("multiLine", True)
         .csv(llattrdata_path)
)

print(df.columns)
print("Column count:", len(df.columns))

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

dfv = (
    df
    .withColumn("DefID", F.col("DefID").cast("int"))
    .withColumn("ID", F.col("ID").cast("long"))
    .withColumn("AttrID", F.col("AttrID").cast("int"))
    .withColumn("VerNum", F.col("VerNum").cast("int"))
    .withColumn(
        "Value",
        F.coalesce(
            F.col("ValStr"),
            F.col("ValLong"),
            F.col("ValInt").cast("string"),
            F.col("ValReal").cast("string"),
            F.date_format(F.col("ValDate"), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
        )
    )
    .select("DefID", "ID", "AttrID", "VerNum", "Value")
)

dfv.show(5, truncate=False)

defids = [
    r["DefID"] for r in (
        dfv_good
        .select("DefID")
        .distinct()
        .collect()
    )
]

print("DefIDs found:", len(defids))
print("First 20:", sorted(defids)[:20])

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

case_site_src = (
    dfv_good
    .filter(
        (F.col("DefID") == "95502") &
        (F.col("ID") == "20779454")
    )
)

display(case_site_src.orderBy(F.col("AttrID").cast("int")))
print("Rows before pivot:", case_site_src.count())

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

case_site_src = (
    df
    .filter(F.col("DefID").cast("int") == 95502)
    .withColumn(
        "Value",
        F.coalesce(
            F.when(
                ~F.lower(F.trim(F.col("ValStr").cast("string"))).isin("undefined", "null", "none", ""),
                F.trim(F.col("ValStr").cast("string"))
            ),
            F.col("ValLong").cast("string"),
            F.col("ValInt").cast("string"),
            F.col("ValReal").cast("string"),
            F.col("ValDate").cast("string")
        )
    )
)

display(
    case_site_src
    .filter(F.col("ID").cast("string") == "20779454")
    .orderBy(F.col("AttrID").cast("int"))
)

print(
    "Rows before pivot:",
    case_site_src.filter(F.col("ID").cast("string") == "20779454").count()
)

test_pivot = (
    case_site_src
    .groupBy("ID")
    .pivot("AttrID")
    .agg(F.first("Value"))
)

display(
    test_pivot
    .filter(F.col("ID").cast("string") == "20779454")
)

print(
    "Rows after pivot:",
    test_pivot.filter(F.col("ID").cast("string") == "20779454").count()
)


display(
    test_pivot
    .filter(F.col("ID").cast("string") == "20779454")
    .select("ID", "1", "2", "3", "4", "5", "6", "7")

from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

def extract_one_defid(defid: int):

    d = dfv_good.filter(F.col("DefID") == defid)

    table = DEFID_TO_TABLE.get(defid, f"DefID_{defid}")
    out_dir = f"{output_base}/{table}_{defid}"

    if defid in [95501, 95506]:

        w = Window.partitionBy("ID", "AttrID").orderBy(F.monotonically_increasing_id())

        d_occ = d.withColumn("row_instance", F.row_number().over(w))

        wide = (
            d_occ
            .groupBy("ID", "row_instance")
            .pivot("AttrID")
            .agg(F.first("Value", ignorenulls=True))
            .orderBy("ID", "row_instance")
        )

    else:

        wide = (
            d
            .groupBy("ID")
            .pivot("AttrID")
            .agg(F.first("Value", ignorenulls=True))
            .orderBy("ID")
        )

    # CLEAN DATA (fix quotes, pipes, and line breaks)
    wide_clean = wide
    for c in wide_clean.columns:
        wide_clean = wide_clean.withColumn(
            c,
            F.when(F.col(c).isNull(), None)
            .otherwise(
                F.trim(
                    F.regexp_replace(            # collapse whitespace
                        F.regexp_replace(        # fix double quotes
                            F.regexp_replace(    # replace pipe delimiter
                                F.regexp_replace(
                                    F.col(c).cast("string"),
                                    r"[\r\n]+",
                                    " "
                                ),
                                r"\|",
                                "/"
                            ),
                            r'""',
                            '"'
                        ),
                        r"\s+",
                        " "
                    )
                )
            )
        )

    (
        wide_clean.write
        .mode("overwrite")
        .option("header", True)
        .option("sep", "|")
        .option("quote", '"')
        .option("escape", '"')
        .option("quoteAll", True)
        .csv(out_dir)
    )

    print(f"Wrote DefID {defid} -> {out_dir}")
